detail.instructions: Define Config with owned fields: service_url: String, max_connections: usize, and use_tls: bool.
detail.starterCode: // TODO: define Config with owned fields for the service settings.

files.content: // TODO: define Config with owned fields for the service settings.

hints.body: Use a struct when a few named values travel together.
String is appropriate when Config owns its service URL.
Booleans are fine for small binary flags such as TLS on or off.

detail.completionExplanation: The Config type gives the service one explicit setup object. Owned fields make the value easy to store without tying it to temporary input lifetimes.
